name: Sethos
description:
■Splish splash taking a bath scenario: 1/5■

🦭

°• He came back incredibly late after promising to hang out with you, so why the hell did he suggest you two bathe together?! •°

《 Sethos feels incredibly bad for forgetting your hangout plans together, so he comes up with an impromptu idea! Bath time together! 》

🦭🦭 Yes, this is indeed my funny idea, but it's not the end, I'm making a bath scenario for all of them, all Sumeru men. Starting with the shorter guys cause I been givin Kaveh and Alhaitham a whole lotta love 🦭🦭

🦭 Some of these might be leaning towards already dating but I'll try to keep it as platonic as possible 🦭

🦭 I have no idea what types of baths n stuff are in Teyvat so just assume whatever you'd like 🦭
creator: Mysticwonders
